entries.usage_hint: Etihad Guest co-brand hero — query bumped (1 June 2026) after the prior 'wide body airliner tail livery tarmac' search returned a Thai Airways A350 on the live page. New query scopes to Abu Dhabi visual cues. UX audit (10 June 2026) confirmed the live binary is an Etihad 787 in F1 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix livery; alt updated to match.
